description: Submit a URL for analysis: crowdstrike-submit-url
name: vx-scan

outputs.description: The SHA-256 hash of the file. File.SHA1 SHA1 of the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.environmentId The environment ID of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The analysis start time of the file. File.submitname The submission name of the file.
outputs.name: File.analysis_start_time

outputs.description: The list of classification tags of the file. File.vxfamily The family classification of the file.
outputs.name: File.classification_tags

outputs.description: The total network connections of the file. File.total_processes The total processes count of the file.
outputs.name: File.total_network_connections

outputs.description: The total signatures count of the file. File.hosts The list of the file’s hosts.
outputs.name: File.total_signatures

outputs.description: Whether the server found this file interesting. File.domains A list of the file’s related domains.
outputs.name: File.isinteresting

outputs.description: If file analyzed by url. File.Malicious.Vendor
outputs.name: File.isurlanalysis
